user.title: Import a C-Bus Toolkit project
user.description: Upload a Toolkit `.cbz` backup or project XML. The integration imports project/network names, CNI IP addresses and ports, custom lighting applications, and group tags.

confirm.title: Confirm imported project
confirm.description:
{summary}

Confirming will connect to every detected TCP CNI. A CNI normally permits only one client, so disconnect Toolkit or any other CNI client first.

reconfigure.title: Update Toolkit project
reconfigure.description: Upload a newer backup of the same project. Address-based entity IDs are preserved.

error.invalid_project: The file could not be parsed as a supported Toolkit CBZ/XML project.
error.different_project: The uploaded file has a different C-Bus project identifier. Add it as a separate integration instead.
error.invalid_port: Enter a TCP port from 1 to 65535.

abort.already_configured: This C-Bus project is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The Toolkit project was updated successfully.

connection.title: Connection for {network}
connection.description: Leave host and port overrides empty to follow the values in the latest Toolkit project. A manual host can also make a project network whose saved interface is Serial usable through a NAC/CNI.

data.monitor_application: Application used for MMI status monitoring

entities.title: Imported entities
entities.description: Generated fitting/group tags are hidden by default. Motion-named lighting groups can be exposed as read-only motion sensors.

data.motion_groups_as_binary_sensors: Expose motion groups as binary sensors
